title: Bella
description: A single feature mod that adds the ability to put bells on animals.
body:
# Bella

### This mod requires [Quilt Loader](https://quiltmc.org/install/) and [Quilt Standard Libraries](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl)

![ModFest: Singularity](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1008539448016916717/1011047045735395448/ModFest_Singularity_Banner.png)

Bella is a mod with a single feature. 

That single feature being that you are able to attach bells to most animal entities, at least if they have a head that isn't their body and they have the same base model. This should work on modded entities too, so feel free to try it out on any of those.

You can also take the bell off any entity by right clicking with an empty hand while sneaking or use string on a belled entity to stop the sounds of the bell.

![](https://i.imgur.com/JEQ60ff.png)
___
## Questions

#### Why is the mod named Bella?
I named it after my friend's sheep on a Minecraft server we were on.

#### Fabric/NeoForge?
When this gets rewritten.

#### Discord?
[Pug's Modzone](https://discord.gg/UBfEjsANNz)

___

Shoutouts to Eriksonn.
